title: Syrian Cornmeal Wrap
description: A traditional Syrian twist on a cornmeal flatbread, served as a delicious wrap.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together cornmeal, sumac, black pepper, and salt.
Gradually add the water to the cornmeal mixture and stir until a dough forms.
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces.
Roll out each piece into a thin circle.
Brush each circle with olive oil.
Heat a large skillet or griddle over medium-high heat.
Cook each circle for 1-2 minutes, until the edges start to curl.
Flip each circle and cook for another minute.
Repeat with the remaining dough pieces.
